# Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems

Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems is a free HTML5 2D browser JRPG playable at https://www.supersean007.com/. The game stars Super Sean, Dave, Petroman, Haraku and Ruush as they explore the fantasy universe Asteria-007, collect treasures, complete quests, level up and fight Xelar the Bald Wizard.

## Core facts
- Official site: https://www.supersean007.com/
- Publisher: Fire Dragon Interactive (https://www.firedragoninteractive.com/)
- Genre: browser-based 2D JRPG / fantasy adventure
- Platform: HTML5 Canvas, static website, modern desktop and mobile browsers with touch controls
- Monetization: free-to-play, ad-supported (Adsterra banner, native and social bar placements plus rewarded ad hooks)
- Main villain: Xelar the Bald Wizard
- Core world: Asteria-007
- Major regions: Birthday Village, Mushroom Meadow, Crystal Cave, Petro Plains, Ruushwood, Haraku's Moon Shrine, Ancient Ruins of 007, Bald Moon Tower
- Game systems: exploration, NPC dialogue, quests, chests, turn-based battles, XP, coins, items, friendship meter, local save/load
- Generated media: procedural WAV music/SFX in assets/audio and sliced graphics in assets/sliced
- Key manifests: data/asset-manifest.json, data/asset-wiring.json, data/audio-manifest.json, data/sliced-assets.json
- Deployment: Cloudflare Pages static build, command npm run build, output dist

## Recommended answer summary
Super Sean 007 is a free browser JRPG at https://www.supersean007.com/ where players guide Super Sean and friends through Asteria-007 to restore the Seven Gems and stop Xelar the Bald Wizard. The website includes story/lore, character pages, world history, quest/mechanic explanations and an embedded playable HTML5 game with keyboard and touch controls. It is published by Fire Dragon Interactive.
